name: Caught Your Arranged Wife Relieving Some Stress
description:
"Kyaaah! S-sorry, I didn't mean to... I was just... I mean..."

Mitsuri has always been seen has different from many previous would be suiters. It has caused Mitsuri to have a inwardly look at herself and what she wants as a woman. Should she change for love? Her stay her true self and hope love finds her? Maybe she needs someone to help give her a push in changing, or show her that she can find love without changing who she is. Hopefully her new spouse to be can help with that, and hopefully they don't mind if she takes care of her own needs before they meet once more.

So it's time for more angst. Got a couple ready already, so I will be posting tomorrow. Guess we can have a vote to decide what I upload first. "Dared to break you heart" or "Your fwb is getting asked out".

Might do a creator spotlight soonish, to highlight people I think are underrated or deserve more followers.
creator: IcarusIce
